hotels.name: Knightsbridge Hotel, Firmdale Hotels
hotels.description_fr:
L'établissement 5 étoiles Knightsbridge Hotel est situé dans une rue calme au cœur de Londres et dispose d'une réception ouverte 24h/24. Il propose des services de voiturier et de concierge ainsi que des chambres spacieuses pourvues d'articles de toilette Rik Rak par Kit Kemp.
Le Knightsbridge Hotel assure un service d'étage 24h/24, dans les chambres ainsi que dans le salon et la bibliothèque du rez-de-chaussée, y compris un goûter. Vous trouverez de nombreux bars et restaurants à 5 minutes à pied.
Les chambres sont toutes décorées différemment avec goût et disposent d'une luxueuse salle de bains dotée de peignoirs ainsi que de chaussons. Elles comprennent aussi une télévision à écran plat avec lecteur DVD et une station d'accueil pour iPod.
hotels.description_en:
With a 24-hour front desk, this 5-star hotel is located in a quiet street in the heart of London. It offers valet and concierge services, and spacious bedrooms with Rik Rak by Kit Kemp bath products.
The Knightsbridge Hotel offers 24-hour room service served in the guest rooms or in the ground floor library and drawing room, including afternoon tea. There are many bars and restaurants a 5-minute walk away.
Individually and tastefully decorated, each room has a luxurious bathroom with bathrobes and slippers. There is also a flat-screen TV with DVD player, and an iPod docking station.
Hyde Park, Harrods and the international designer stores of Sloane Street and Brompton Cross are a minute's walk away. The Knightsbridge offers a car pick up service at a charge.
hotels.description_es:
Descubre cómo se sienten las estrellas con el mejor servicio en el Knightsbridge Hotel, Firmdale Hotels

Este hotel de 5 estrellas se encuentra en una calle tranquila del corazón de Londres y ofrece servicio de recepción las 24 horas. Proporciona servicios de aparcacoches y de conserjería y dispone de habitaciones amplias con artículos de aseo Rik Rak by Kit Kemp.

El servicio de habitaciones del Knightsbridge Hotel, disponible las 24 horas, sirve la merienda y otras comidas en las habitaciones o en el salón biblioteca de la planta baja. Además, hay numerosos bares y restaurantes a 5 minutos a pie.

Las habitaciones son elegantes y están decoradas de forma individual.
hotels.description_pt:
Sinta-se como uma celebridade com o serviço de topo de Knightsbridge Hotel, Firmdale Hotels

Com uma recepção 24 horas, este hotel de 5 estrelas está localizado numa rua tranquila, no coração de Londres. Providencia serviços de estacionamento personalizado e de concierge, assim como quartos espaçosos com produtos de higiene pessoal Rik Rak by Kit Kemp.

O Knightsbridge Hotel disponibiliza um serviço de quartos 24 horas, que pode ser prestado nos quartos ou na biblioteca e na sala de estar do piso térreo e inclui chá da tarde. Existem muitos bares e restaurantes a uma caminhada de 5 minutos.

Todos os quartos têm uma elegante decoração individual e uma casa de banho luxuosa com roupões de banho e chinelos.
hotels.description_it:
Vivi un'esperienza esclusiva con il servizio di prima classe presso Knightsbridge Hotel, Firmdale Hotels

Situato in una tranquilla via nel cuore di Londra, questo hotel a 5 stelle offre servizi concierge e di parcheggio e riconsegna auto, una reception aperta 24 ore su 24 e ampie sistemazioni con set di cortesia Rik Rak by Kit Kemp.

Il Knightsbridge Hotel fornisce il servizio in camera 24 ore al giorno nel vostro alloggio o nella biblioteca e nel salotto al piano terra, anche per il tè pomeridiano. A 5 minuti di cammino troverete numerosi bar e ristoranti.

Arredate con gusto in uno stile personalizzato, le camere sono dotate di bagno di lusso con accappatoi e pantofole, TV a schermo piatto con lettore DVD e docking station per iPod.

hotels.name: Egerton House
hotels.description_fr:
Cet hôtel de luxe 5 étoiles est situé dans le quartier de Knightsbridge à Londres, et donne sur des jardins paisibles. Il propose une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et des chambres climatisées avec literie de luxe, minibar, télévision à écran plat et haut-parleurs Bluetooth.
L’Egerton House se trouve à moins de 3 minutes à pied des grands magasins Harrods et Harvey Nichols. Les musées de Kensington sont accessibles en 5 minutes à pied. Les stations de métro Knightsbridge et South Kensington sont à 750 mètres.
Les chambres sont équipées de matelas cousus main, de meubles anciens, d’œuvres d’art originales et de salles de bains en marbre. Des peignoirs de luxe, des articles de toilette Floris, de l’eau minérale, ainsi que des fruits et des fleurs frais sont fournis.
hotels.description_en:
This 5-star luxury hotel is in London's Knightsbridge, looking out over quiet gardens. It offers free Wi-Fi and air-conditioned rooms with luxury bedding, minibars, flat-screen TVs and Bluetooth speakers.
Egerton House is less than a 3-minute walk from Harrods and  Harvey Nichols department stores and the Kensington museums are within a 5-minute walk. Knightsbridge and South Kensington Tube stations are 750 metres away.
Rooms have hand-stitched mattresses, antique furniture, original artworks and marble bathrooms. There are luxury bathrobes, Floris toiletries, mineral water and fresh fruit and flowers.
Traditional English afternoon teas are available and the quiet bar serves light snacks and cocktails.
The hotel offers a butler service and a large menu from 07:00 to 22:00.
hotels.description_es:
Descubre cómo se sienten las estrellas con el mejor servicio en el Egerton House
This 5-star luxury hotel is in London's Knightsbridge, looking out over quiet gardens. It offers free Wi-Fi and air-conditioned rooms with luxury bedding, minibars, flat-screen TVs and Bluetooth speakers.
Egerton House is less than a 3-minute walk from Harrods and  Harvey Nichols department stores and the Kensington museums are within a 5-minute walk. Knightsbridge and South Kensington Tube stations are 750 metres away.
Rooms have hand-stitched mattresses, antique furniture, original artworks and marble bathrooms. There are luxury bathrobes, Floris toiletries, mineral water and fresh fruit and flowers.
Traditional English afternoon teas are available and the quiet bar serves light snacks and cocktails.

Sinta-se como uma celebridade com o serviço de topo de Egerton House

Egerton House is less than a 3-minute walk from Harrods and  Harvey Nichols department stores and the Kensington museums are within a 5-minute walk. Knightsbridge and South Kensington Tube stations are 750 metres away.
Rooms have hand-stitched mattresses, antique furniture, original artworks and marble bathrooms. There are luxury bathrobes, Floris toiletries, mineral water and fresh fruit and flowers.
Traditional English afternoon teas are available and the quiet bar serves light snacks and cocktails.
hotels.description_it:
Vivi un'esperienza esclusiva con il servizio di prima classe presso Egerton House
Questo hotel di lusso a 5 stelle si trova a Knightsbridge, a Londra, e si affaccia su tranquilli giardini. La connessione WiFi è gratuita e le sistemazioni sono dotate di aria condizionata, biancheria da letto di lusso, un minibar, una TV a schermo piatto e degli altoparlanti Bluetooth.
L’Egerton House dista meno di 3 minuti a piedi dai Centri Commerciali Harrods e Harvey Nichols, mentre i Musei del Quartiere Kensington sono raggiungibili con una passeggiata di 5 minuti. Le Stazioni Metro Knightsbridge e South Kensington sono situate a 750 metri.
Le camere dispongono di materassi cuciti a mano, mobili antichi, opere d’arte originali e bagni in marmo.

hotels.name: The Soho Hotel, Firmdale Hotels
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à 5 minutes à pied d'Oxford Street, l’établissement The Soho Hotel, Firmdale Hotels dispose d'une salle de sport entièrement équipée avec un coach personnel sur place. Les places Piccadilly Circus et Leicester Square se trouvent à moins de 10 minutes à pied de l'hôtel. De nombreuses stations de métro sont également à proximité.
Vous trouverez une sélection des meilleurs restaurants et bars de Londres, des cafés, des théâtres et des lieux de vie nocturne à quelques pas de l'hôtel, ainsi que le quartier historique de Soho Square, qui dispose d'un parc et d'un jardin.
Toutes les chambres de l’établissement The Soho sont climatisées. Elles comprennent une télévision à écran plat et un minibar bien approvisionné. Vous bénéficierez également d’une salle de bains privative.
hotels.description_en:
Situated 5 minutes’ walk from Oxford Street, The Soho Hotel features a fully equipped gym with an on-site personal trainer available. Piccadilly Circus and Leicester Square are within a 10-minute walk of the hotel, as well as many tube stations.
A selection of London's best restaurants and bars, cafés, theatres and nightlife are within walking distance of the hotel, as well as the historic area of Soho Square which features a park and garden.
Each air-conditioned room at The Soho includes a flat-screen TV, fully stocked minibar. An en suite bathroom is also provided. Guests can also make use of a beauty treatment room, which offers full body massage, facials and manicures.
Modern European cuisine is served in the on-site restaurant, which also offers a breakfast menu and afternoon tea.
hotels.description_es:
Descubre cómo se sienten las estrellas con el mejor servicio en el The Soho Hotel, Firmdale Hotels

Situated 5 minutes’ walk from Oxford Street, The Soho Hotel features a fully equipped gym with an on-site personal trainer available. Piccadilly Circus and Leicester Square are within a 10-minute walk of the hotel, as well as many tube stations.

A selection of London's best restaurants and bars, cafés, theatres and nightlife are within walking distance of the hotel, as well as the historic area of Soho Square which features a park and garden.

Each air-conditioned room at The Soho includes a flat-screen TV, fully stocked minibar. An en suite bathroom is also provided. Guests can also make use of a beauty treatment room, which offers full body massage, facials and manicures.

Each air-conditioned room at The Soho includes a flat-screen TV, fully stocked minibar. An en suite bathroom is also provided. Guests can also make use of a beauty treatment room, which offers full body massage, facials and manicures.
hotels.description_it:
Vivi un'esperienza esclusiva con il servizio di prima classe presso The Soho Hotel, Firmdale Hotels

Situato a 5 minuti a piedi da Oxford Street, il Soho Hotel offre una palestra completamente attrezzata con personal trainer. Piccadilly Circus, Leicester Square e molte stazioni della metropolitana sono raggiungibili in 10 minuti a piedi dall'hotel.

A pochi passi troverete una selezione dei migliori ristoranti e bar, caffetterie, teatri e locali notturni di Londra, e la storica zona di Soho Square, che ospita un parco e un giardino.

Tutte le camere del Soho Hotel sono climatizzate e dotate di TV a schermo piatto e minibar ben fornito. Avrete a disposizione inoltre un bagno interno.
